concepts.headline: 900 stars in 48 hours.
concepts.subtext: Mike, the open source legal AI, launched and the community responded immediately.
concepts.layout_description: Left-anchored hero layout. The headline '900 stars in 48 hours.' sits bold and dominant at 56px in the upper-left quadrant, anchored to a strong left alignment edge at 64px padding. Below it, a thin 2px warm sand accent bar (#d7c8af) spans 120px, fading to transparent rightward. Subtext sits beneath at 18px in #555, under 25 words. In the lower-left, three stat tiles in DM Mono display '900+ stars', '200+ forks', and '48 hrs' as square-edged chips with #f0efe9 surface and 1px #e5e5e5 borders. The right 45% of the canvas is reserved for a particle dot network: scattered gray circles 3-6px at 0.08 opacity connected by 0.5px hairline strokes, suggesting organic community growth. Flywheel wordmark bottom-left at 12px DM Mono uppercase, #888. Canvas breathes with 60%+ negative space.
concepts.color_usage: Background #ffffff. Headline #111. Subtext #555. Stat chip surfaces #f0efe9, borders #e5e5e5, values in #111 DM Mono, labels in #888. Accent bar #d7c8af. Particle dots #6b7a7c at 0.08 opacity. Brand mark #888.
concepts.reasoning: A single hero statistic anchors this post. '900 stars in 48 hours' is the undeniable signal of momentum and deserves the stat_callout treatment. The left-anchored layout with particle dots on the right embodies Flywheel's editorial restraint while the DM Mono stat chips ground the claim in data precision.

concepts.headline: Nine hundred stars in 48 hours.
concepts.subtext: Mike, the open source legal AI, is already being extended with courtlistener API integrations and local deployments.
concepts.layout_description: Left-anchored editorial layout on a warm #faf9f6 surface. A thin 2px warm sand bar (#d7c8af) runs across the top of the card at full width, fading to transparent at the right edge. An eyebrow label in DM Mono uppercase at 11px reads 'OPEN SOURCE / LEGAL AI' in #888 with 0.07em letter-spacing, 16px below the top bar. The headline follows at 52px, weight 600, letter-spacing -0.03em, color #111, spanning roughly 60% of canvas width. A 1px #e5e5e5 horizontal rule sits 28px below the headline. Subtext at 18px in #555 sits beneath the rule, max 420px wide. Three square-edged stat labels in DM Mono sit in a horizontal row at the lower-left: '900+', '200+', 'Extensions live', each with a small muted label below in #888. Right 40% of canvas holds only the particle dot network at 0.07 opacity. Flywheel wordmark bottom-left at 12px uppercase DM Mono.
concepts.color_usage: Surface #faf9f6. Top accent bar #d7c8af. Eyebrow #888. Headline #111. Rule #e5e5e5. Subtext #555. Stat values #111 DM Mono, stat labels #888. Particle dots #6b7a7c at 0.07 opacity.
concepts.reasoning: The headline plus subtext card creates an editorial narrative that contextualizes the raw numbers. The eyebrow label establishes category, the headline punches the key metric, and the subtext adds the community activity detail. Feels like a premium tech publication news brief.

concepts.headline: Open source legal AI is moving fast.
concepts.subtext: Mike launched 48 hours ago. 900 stars, 200 forks, and community-built extensions already exist.
concepts.layout_description: Centered statement composition on a pure #ffffff background. A faint FLYWHEEL watermark at 140px bold uppercase sits centered at 0.03 opacity behind all content. The headline centers on the canvas at 54px, weight 600, letter-spacing -0.04em, color #111, max 520px wide, allowing natural line break after 'AI'. A 64px vertical gap separates the headline from a 2px warm sand accent bar (#d7c8af) that spans 80px centered below it. Subtext follows at 17px in #555, centered, max 480px wide. The entire composition floats in 65% negative space. A thin 1px #e5e5e5 border frames the card 40px inset from canvas edges, giving a gallery-label quality. Flywheel wordmark bottom-center at 11px DM Mono uppercase in #888, 64px from bottom edge. No particle dots in this composition, letting the typographic tension carry the visual weight.
concepts.color_usage: Background #ffffff. FLYWHEEL watermark #000 at 0.03 opacity. Headline #111. Accent bar #d7c8af. Subtext #555. Structural border #e5e5e5 at 1px. Brand mark #888.
concepts.reasoning: The post's core energy is the surprise and momentum of an open source project exploding overnight. A centered bold statement lets that feeling land without data diluting the emotional punch. The FLYWHEEL watermark and inset border give it the museum-label quality that defines Flywheel's editorial restraint.

selection_reasoning: The stat_callout concept best embodies Flywheel's visual identity because it leads with the single most compelling data point, '900 stars in 48 hours,' and lets that number carry the entire composition. The left-anchored hero layout with particle dot network on the right achieves the required asymmetric balance and 60%+ negative space. The DM Mono stat chips ground the post's claims in precise data without cluttering the canvas. It reads like a premium tech publication data brief, not a marketing announcement.
